name: Sicily von Claude
nativeName: シシリー フォン クロード
description: Sizilien is the third daughter and fourth child of the House of Claude. [Shin](https://anilist.co/character/138191) encounters Sizilien when she and [Maria](https://anilist.co/character/138195) were being harassed by demon hunters. She was amazed by how quickly he dispatched the bigger and more intimidating men.
searchTerms: シシリー フォン クロード

name: Ayano Tateyama
description: First appeared in Transparent Answer. A cheerful girl who was Shintaro's classmate. During the summer of her first year of high school, she made contact with Shintaro, who had a tendency to keep a distance, but who soon relented to her advances and genuinely enjoyed her company. From then on the two became close friends. Shintaro catches her crying one day, but is at a loss at what to do and leaves. The next day it is revealed that she had commited suicide for some unknown reason. ~! Jin's eleve

name: Hayato Kamitani
description: A third-year student and Ryuuichi's classmate. He is the older brother of Taka. He is also a member of the baseball team. Hayato's name is written using the kanji for falcon. ~!Kamitani later joins Ryuuichi in the babysitting club as a part-time member.!~

name: Seiya Kanie
description: Seiya is a perfectionist high school student who is mentally sharp, intelligent, has excellent reflexes, and acts like a prince to the point of being a narcissist, much to the annoyance of others. He was involved with the entertainment industry as a child, bearing the stage name Seiya Kodama. According to Isuzu, he was a child who would have made every adult/parent proud.

name: Jack
description: __Species:__ Labrador Retriever Both one of Legoshi's roommates and his best friend for many years, Jack is a rather average guy. He is often weirded out by Legoshi's behavior, especially involving Haru, but he is always there for his best friend.

name: Kagaya Ubuyashiki
description: He is the head of the Ubuyashiki Family and 97th leader of the Demon Slayer Corps known mainly as "Oyakata-sama" ("Master") by his subordinates and peers.

name: Merlin
description: Merlin is believed to be the son of the Princess of Wales and an Incubus, his mixed blood and his astounding talent for magic make him one of the greatest Mages that ever lived and one of the few qualified to be a Grand Caster. Like all the most supreme mages he possesses powerful Clairvoyance abilities. Merlin's, however, allows him only to see the present. name: Cheong-Myeong
description: Cheong-Myeong usually has a carefree nature and enjoys fooling around. However, when he has a goal, he sets his mind to it. Cheong-Myeong is intelligent, but often uses that to his advantage (but sometimes end up offending others). He enjoys drinking and indulges himself with food. Cheong-Myeong is sadistic and likes playing around with his seniors. He has confidence and doesn't waver in every situation and knows when he should retreat or run away.

name: Yukiya Himuro
description: __Height:__ 181 cm The descendant of a Yuki Onna. Himuro freezes things surrounding him when he feels certain emotions. Even though his surroundings are always cold, Himuro is a warm and kind person. He likes flowers and cats, but he can't get too close to either of them. In his daily life, he spends a lot of time working and socializing with his co-worker Fuyutsuki.
mediaTitles: The Ice Guy and His Cool Female Colleague

name: Ena Shinonome
description: __Height:__ 158 cm (5'2") Ena is the illustrator for the online music circle Nightcord at 25:00, where she goes by the alias “Enanan.” Her father is a famous artist and serves as her inspiration for drawing. Ena was invited to join Nightcord at 25:00 by [Kanade](https://anilist.co/character/249636), who adored the illustrations she created.

name: Fuuka Kikuchi
description: Fuuka is a reserved and book-loving classmate of Fumiya who often spends time at the library. As she is an aspiring novelist, she loves to speculate about and study different people's motives for their actions and experiences that shaped them to who they are today. Her favorite author is Michael Andi.

description: __Height:__ 149 cm She became a member of Enormeeta to beat up magical girls, because she hated that they got more attention than her on social media. description: Kiyoshi is the main character of the series and the first boy in Hachimitsu Academy to make contact with a girl.

name: Alex Benedetto
nativeName: アレックス・ベネデット
description: A prostitute who is assisted by Worick and Nicolas during one of their jobs. Although ordered to eliminate her, Benriya decides instead to claim her as "loot" - effectively saving her life. With nowhere else to go, Alex begins working as Benriya's secretary. She is currently learning sign language so that she can better communicate with Nicolas.

name: Tooru Hagakure
description: __Height:__ 152 cm (5'0") __Quirk:__ Invisibility Student in Class 1-A at U.A. High School. Tooru is a bubbly, cheery, and easygoing girl who does most things with an upbeat attitude. She is very socially eager and likes shopping, and her room suggests that she likes plushies and other cute things. Tooru's Quirk is that her body is completely invisible. name: Aika Fuwa
description: Aika was Mahiro's sister that was brutally murdered. Her murder is the central mystery that haunts the narrative in the series. Aika had a penchant for quoting Shakespeare, particularly Hamlet and The Tempest by William Shakespeare. ~!She secretly dated Yoshino, whom she deeply loved. She stated that Yoshino is the only person she would date and that she would not consider anyone else, even if Yoshino were interested in another person. name: Lenalee Lee
description: __Height:__ 166 cm __Nationality:__ Chinese Also known as Rinali Komui's younger sister, and assistant Head Officer. Her parents were killed by an Akuma when she was very young. Because she is an Accommodator, the Black Order took her away from her only remaining family member (Komui) to Headquarters against her will. name: Ryouta Watari
description: Ryouta is Kousei and Tsubaki's childhood friend who is also the captain of the school's soccer team. He is extremely popular with girls, often adopting a frivolous attitude. However, he does once in a while come up with good insight.
